steps.title: Read the limitation
steps.content: The underlined sentence says many fossil studies relied on incomplete data sets. It follows a contrast between genetic studies and fossil studies, then prepares for a larger 2022 fossil investigation that uses more than 1,000 fossils.

steps.title: Rule out misread purposes
steps.content: A says the sentence overviews tools, but it discusses data quality. C shifts to crocodile evolution, which is not the focus. D targets genetic studies, while the sentence specifically limits fossil studies. The answer is B.
